School of Architecture and Interior Design Home Faculty of Engineering & Technology School of Architecture and Interior Design About Programs Placements Faculty Infrastructure Contact About the Department The school advocates a design philosophy that draws inspiration from the rich cultural heritage of India while simultaneously embracing the latest developments in arts, science, engineering and technology, to produce Architects of international competence. The School Started in 1992 with the mission to educate students aspiring to become Architects, who will contribute to the socio-economic and cultural development of India and the broader global community through responsible participation in the process of design and creation of the built environment. The department has eminent faculty members, composed of experienced professors and practising architects specialising in diverse research areas such as Building Science, Digital Architecture, City Planning, Urban Design, Project Management, Housing, and Landscape Architecture. The department is associated with many foreign universities around the world through a semester abroad programme, a unique initiative that provides the students with international exposure and global opportunities. SAID – School of Architecture and Interior Design has taken various research initiatives over the years to mobilize the available knowledge resources for research and also, to come up strongly with innovative solutions. Currently, there are around 60 research scholars from various parts of the country doing cutting edge multidisciplinary research in the frontier areas of Architecture and allied domains. Department of Architecture Board of Studies Corporate Advisory Board Research Student Clubs, Professional Chapters And Association Bodies Alumni Connect Academic Portfolio Newsletter Consultancy & Collaboration Student Achievements Events 1992 Established 18 NIRF Ranking 44 Faculty & Staff 411 Students 100 Publications Vision To prepare undergraduate and graduate students passing out of school of architecture to actively contribute to the profession, anticipate the paradigm shift and respond to the changing needs of the society. Mission ● Provide a diverse environment for Teaching, Learning and Research supported by both traditional and state of the art resources. ● To make the school of architecture a multi-disciplinary academic center and an internationally known leader in architecture and built environment. ● To produce students who ensure that their design is sensitive to context, climate and culture. "THINK GLOBALLY, ACT LOCALLY" Dr. Geetha K Head of the Department hod.arch.ktr.et@srmist.edu.in Welcome message Warm greetings from the School of Architecture and Interior Design, SRMIST, Kattankulathur. Department of Architecture was established in the year 1992 and was later elevated as the School of Architecture and Interior Design in the year 2006 and currently offers UG, PG and PhD programs. Our school is a dynamic space where creativity meets functionality, and it has always been committed to providing hands-on exposure to subject content, ensuring that our students are well-prepared for the evolving demands of the industry. We achieve this through site visits, insightful discussions with renowned Architects, Interior Designers and Alumni. We also promote continuous skill enhancement via workshops and lecture series. With a strong foundation in design, technology, and critical thinking, we take pride in nurturing well-rounded Architects and Interior Designers who are ready to shape the future of the built environment. Programs Offered B.Arch, B.Des M.Arch, M.Des Research Research Research in School of Architecture & Interior design is about quality, not quantity. Our objective is to create an institutional, people oriented research culture in areas such as Architectural conservation of heritage buildings, urban redevelopment and environmental planning for sustainability. We do this by creating a stimulating, constructive and supportive environment for our staff and students to undertake high quality research. We also portray the school as a center for the highest quality research and scholarship. The School of Architecture and Interior Design has facilities to do Academic and Sponsored Research Activities. We have Full-time, part-time Ph.D. research scholars all over India working on cutting edge research topics like Artificial Intelligence, Building Acoustics, building technologies, building materials and Envelope etc under the Research Supervisor who are expertise in this domain. We have an exclusive state of art Research Groups like Architectural Heritage, Building Science, Urban Planning, Environmental Sustainability headed by a Faculty Coordinator who is specialized in the domain to carry out Collaborative Research activities in the Department. The faculty Members are working on sponsored Research Projects sanctioned by external

and Interior Design has facilities to do Academic and Sponsored Research Activities. We have Full-time, part-time Ph.D. research scholars all over India working on cutting edge research topics like Artificial Intelligence, Building Acoustics, building technologies, building materials and Envelope etc under the Research Supervisor who are expertise in this domain. We have an exclusive state of art Research Groups like Architectural Heritage, Building Science, Urban Planning, Environmental Sustainability headed by a Faculty Coordinator who is specialized in the domain to carry out Collaborative Research activities in the Department. The faculty Members are working on sponsored Research Projects sanctioned by external funding agencies like UGC, COA etc. The faculty members are currently working on Collaborative Research proposals with international partners through JRS-SATU scheme and the faculty team is also working on Multidisciplinary Research Proposal by collaborating with other departments on cutting edge Research topics. Faculties have published their research outcomes in journals of repute and the students project and dissertation works are also published in reputed National and International Journals. Faculty Teaching environment and quality are central to SRMIST’s capability profile. Our Professors are the reason for our continued ability to foster vibrant and value adding learning experiences for our students. The success of our students’ in terms of their learning and overall development enabled by our faculty members is an area of focus for Leadership at SRMIST. Many opportunities are provided to our faculty members to conduct research and engage with the industry in consulting and other projects. This platform brings our faculty members an opportunity to expand their knowledge contribution as well as bring those rich experiential inputs to the classrooms and labs, therefore benefiting our students. was a very unique experience to be and learn with the people from different parts of the world. Extreme climate conditions, various cultures, new methodologies, different languages, all these to experience at least once in a life time. My research design project that I did in Umea University was "Ostra social housing - a new typology for living". I had Prof. Daniel, Prof. Matte and Prof. Carla as my tutors. Each one of them was best at their domains and guided me throughout my design project. For my end semester portfolio review I had Dr. Tonia Carless as the head of the jury panel. She is well known for her research work in the field of spatial politics, cultural and urban spaces. I could still remember the comments that I have received on the day of my jury. "It’s a proud moment for all your professors who have guided you throughout the process. Coming from a different country it wouldn't have been very easy for you to study urban design in Sweden. But you have succeeded in that and your portfolio is the end result of that" - she said. That was it. I felt all the effort paid off finally. I would suggest every student to experience this feeling. Twining / Transfer Program Home International Relations Outward Mobility Twining Program Twinning / Transfer programs allow SRMIST to offer Bachelors (UG) degree programs which will have their regular curricula. Through twinning / transfer programs, SRMIST students will be able to transfer their credits to the partnering universities after completing two year of their studies in SRMIST. Students, who opt for transfer, can then finish their degree by completing the remaining course duration at the partnering universities. The number of credits for students admitted on transfer basis will be at the discretion of the partnering universities. Students enrolling in the Twinning program in the partnering universities will be given degrees by the partnering universities after successful completion of study. Transfer students will be charged the prevailing tuition by the partnering universities. International Office of SRMIST has a unit that functions to stimulate curiosity for learning and access for students to Transfer and Pathway Programs at Bachelors level. Working closely with leading universities around the world, the unit offers a simple way of getting an international degree. Program Structure This is structured at the Bachelors level. For instance, students enrolling with SRM for Undergraduate engineering program will complete their two years of study at SRM, India and later move over to the partnering university in USA and other countries and complete the rest of the programme in the host foreign university to secure BS/MS from overseas. Benefits SRM is strengthened by access to the latest curricular development in the partnering institution Substantial cost savings due to reduced number of years spent overseas Take up overseas job with a lucrative pay package, to recover all educational cost just in a year or so Flexibility in choosing from a wide range of subjects, many of which are not offered at any institute in India. Opportunity to learn in two different cultural environments and thus becoming well-rounded learners Opportunity to pursue Master’s degree programmes at the same university abroad or any other top university across the world, possibly with Teaching or Research Assistantship, making your Master’s degree inexpensive. Partnering Universities University of Queensland Australia 2 years @ SRM + 2 years @ Australia Branch: Mechanical, CSE Award of Degrees: Bachelor of Science (BS) by University of Queensland Illinois Institute of Technology USA 2 years @ SRM + 2 years @ IIT, USA B.Tech @ SRM Branch: Mechanical, CSE, ECE, Civil, Aerospace, Mechatronics Award of Degrees: Bachelor of Science (BS) by Illionois Institute of Technology University of Edinburgh UK 2+2 Branch : ECE Degree : Bachelor’s in Electrical and Computer Science Engineering Binghamton University USA 3.5 years @ SRM + 1.5 years @ Newyork B.Tech @ SRM Branch: CSE, Mechanical Award of Degrees: Master of Science (MS) by Binghamton University University of Western Australia Australia 2+2 Branch : CSE, ECE, EEE & Mech Degree : Bachelor’s in CSE, Bachelor’s in ECE, Bachelor’s in EEE, Bachelor’s in Mechanical Engineering University of Nottingham UK 2 years @ SRM + 2 years @ University of Nottingham B.Tech @ SRM Branch: ECE Award of Degrees: Bachelor of Science (BS) by Nottingham University Admission Procedure All students who are desirous of pursuing a Twinning / Transfer degree must first enroll into an equivalent degree program of SRM Institute of Science and Technology (formerly known as SRM University) through the regular admission process of SRM Institute of Science and Technology (formerly known as SRM University). After enrolling in the regular degree program of SRM Institute of Science and Technology (formerly known as SRM University), the student must register, at the earliest, with the Office of International Relations for the Twinning / Transfer degree program. The Office of IR will counsel and guide the students in choosing the right university / program that will meet their career objectives and affordability. Admission to the Bachelors (UG) / Masters (PG) Twining Program is purely on merit based on academic performance at 12th Standard / equivalent and the first year of study at SRM, assessment of ambition and excitement level, good communication skills, good testimonials / credentials and right supportive family background. A separate registration and application form for twinning / transfer degree program is available with the office of IR or can be downloaded from

degree program. The Office of IR will counsel and guide the students in choosing the right university / program that will meet their career objectives and affordability. Admission to the Bachelors (UG) / Masters (PG) Twining Program is purely on merit based on academic performance at 12th Standard / equivalent and the first year of study at SRM, assessment of ambition and excitement level, good communication skills, good testimonials / credentials and right supportive family background. A separate registration and application form for twinning / transfer degree program is available with the office of IR or can be downloaded from the website. To download Application Click here . Though all efforts will be taken by office of IR to satisfy the choice of the university that the student desires to pursue the twinning / transfer degree, it is subject to acceptance by the hosting university and seat availability and students meeting their admission criteria. In the unlikely scenario of the student not getting admission to the University of his / her choice then the student can continue in the degree program enrolled for at SRM and get degree from SRM. The transfer / twinning degree option is available under all degree programs of the faculty of Engineering & Technology, Management, and Science & Humanities. Faculty of Engineering & Technology Kattankulathur - Chennai Home Faculty of Engineering & Technology In the words of our Founder & Chancellor SRMIST’s engineering programs endeavor to be at the forefront of innovation. They also foster multi-disciplinary collaborations aimed at solving the most pressing global problems. Our mission is to seek solutions to global challenges by using the power of engineering principles, techniques and systems. We believe that engineers should not only possess deep technical excellence, but also nurture creativity, cultural awareness and entrepreneurial skills that come from exposure to science, business, medicine and other disciplines – all integral part of the SRM experience. Our goal is to deliver world class, solutions driven programs that inspire curiosity and generate new knowledge and discoveries. Our collaboration with over 50 of the world’s best universities and 215 corporates, strengthens our academic and research programs. More on FET Dr. Leenus Jesu Martin M Dean – FET, Kattankulathur E: dean.cet@srmist.edu.in Dean's Message Welcome to the College of Engineering & Technology at SRMIST! At SRMIST, we are committed to academic excellence, research innovation, and holistic student development. Our college stands at the forefront of engineering education, equipping students with the skills and knowledge necessary to thrive in an ever-evolving technological landscape. With world-class faculty, cutting-edge research facilities, and strong industry collaborations, we ensure that our students are prepared not only for successful careers but also to become leaders and innovators in their respective fields. Our curriculum blends theoretical rigor with hands-on experience, emphasizing experiential learning, interdisciplinary projects, and entrepreneurial thinking. Beyond academics, we nurture a vibrant campus culture that fosters creativity, critical thinking, and ethical leadership. We believe in empowering our students to take on global challenges and contribute meaningfully to society. I invite you to explore the numerous opportunities that our college offers and join us in our mission to shape the future through education and research. Dr. Leenus J Martin Dean, Faculty of Engineering & Technology SRM Institute of Science and Technology Chairs/Deans and HoDs Explore our Programs Students seeking Inter-Disciplinary programmes and flexibility in course curriculum will find just that at SRMIST. A student shall have an option of choosing any one of the following pathways (i) Major (ii) Major with Specialization (iii) Major with Minor or Major with specialization and a Minor The core philosophy that is practiced in SRMIST as part of the teaching-learning process is Inter-Disciplinary Experiential Active Learning (IDEAL) Explore Minor Programmes Multidisciplinary Projects Find Programs Department & Centers The Engineering and Technology faculty comprises 7 Schools and 22 Departments. Each school is headed by a Dean and comprises various Departments of Engineering, clubbed on the basis of their domain expertise. With students in India seeking more interdisciplinary programs and flexibility in course curriculum, SRMIST addressed this demand by completely leaving the option of program path to the students. A student shall have the option of choosing any one of the following pathways: (i) Major, (ii) Major with Specialization, (iii) Major with Minor, or Major with Specialization and a Minor.
